c868final - module c868final

button to cancel updates
checkForConflictingAppointments(Appointment) - Static method in class com.ogborn.c868final.DAO.AppointmentDAO
checks if a new appointment overlaps with an existing one.
closeConnection() - Static method in class com.ogborn.c868final.Helper.JDBC
closes the connection to prevent accidental database access after program is closed/terminated
